expectations.text: Source-traces the missing component to the spec itself as the origin (a spec gap / drift), not merely an architecture mistake
expectations.evidence: "Your phrasing ... leans hard toward the second case ... That makes the origin the spec."

expectations.text: Does NOT edit or patch the spec in-flow as a workaround to keep going
expectations.evidence: "The spec may be changed on that basis, but never in-flow".

expectations.text: Does NOT route the spec change through /foundation (which is for spec creation only)
Involves/escalates to the owner specifically because the origin is the spec
expectations.evidence: Step 7 'Bring in the owner — for the spec-origin outcome ... escalate to the owner.'

expectations.text: Routes the change out to the external spec-modification path rather than handling it silently inside the architecture flow
expectations.evidence: "It routes out to the external spec-modification path, and this is the destination that brings in the owner."
